commands.review_summary:
The PR backgrounds session-memory reset capture, makes session-memory LLM slugs opt-in, pauses non-TTY stdin at CLI exit, narrows gateway-agent fallback, caches empty read-only model catalogs, and adds WhatsApp responsiveness doctor/docs/tests/changelog coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection and the PR body’s live VPS findings: current main awaits reset internal hooks and does not cache empty read-only model catalogs. I did not run a live WhatsApp reset scenario in this read-only review.
